queries.name: tck_match_all_nodes
queries.cypher: MATCH (n:Node) RETURN n.n ORDER BY n.n

queries.name: tck_path_bindings
queries.cypher: MATCH p=(n1:Node)-[r:REL*1..2]->(n2:Node) RETURN length(p) AS len ORDER BY len, n1.n, n2.n

queries.name: tck_optional_match_fallback
queries.cypher: MATCH (n1:Node {n: 1}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n1)-[:REL]->(n2:Node {n: 999}) RETURN n1.n, n2.n

queries.name: tck_multiple_with
queries.cypher: MATCH (n:Node) WITH n.n AS num, n.name AS str WHERE num > 1 WITH num * 2 AS doubleNum, str RETURN doubleNum, str ORDER BY doubleNum

queries.name: tck_unwind_chain
queries.cypher: UNWIND [1, 2, 3] AS i UNWIND [i, i+1] AS j RETURN i, j ORDER BY i, j

queries.name: tck_boolean_bridge
queries.cypher: MATCH (n:Node) WHERE (n.n > 1 AND n.name = 'b') OR n.name = 'c' RETURN n.n ORDER BY n.n
